subject: Project Management
title: The V-Model
description: A quick win: understand The V-Model.

hook.text: The V-Model is waterfall's smarter sibling: each development phase is paired with a corresponding testing phase.

buildup.text: Requirements pair with acceptance testing. Design pairs with integration testing. Coding pairs with unit testing.

discovery.text: The V-shape shows that testing isn't just at the end — it's planned alongside each development phase from the start.

twist.text: The V-Model addresses waterfall's biggest weakness (late testing) while keeping its strength (structured phases).

climax.text: Widely used in automotive, aerospace, and medical device development where testing traceability is mandatory.

punchline.text: For every phase going down, there's a test going up. That's the V.

quiz.question: How does the V-Model improve on waterfall?
options: Each development phase is paired with a corresponding testing phase from the start
It removes the need for requirements
